verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ
verses.text: Nūn.By the pen and what they write!
You are not, by the blessing of your Lord, possessed.
Surely for you (there is) indeed a reward without end,
(for) surely you (are) indeed on a great undertaking.
So you will see, and they will see,
which of you is the troubled one.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
verses.text: Surely your Lord – He knows who goes astray from His way, and He knows the ones who are (rightly) guided.
So do not obey the ones who call (it) a lie.
They wish that you would compromise, and then they would compromise.
And do not obey any despicable swearer,
a slanderer (who) trades in gossip,
a hinderer of the good, a transgressor (and) sinner,
crude, and besides all that, a bastard,
(just) because he has wealth and sons.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: When Our signs are recited to him, he says, ‘Old tales!’
We shall brand him on the snout!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: Surely We have tested them as We tested the owners of the garden, when they swore they would indeed harvest it in the morning,
but did not make exception.

verses.quran_arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: And so a circler from your Lord went around it while they were sleeping,
and in the morning it was as if it had been harvested.
They called to each other in the morning:

verses.quran_arabic: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰرِمِينَ
verses.text: ‘Go out early to your field, if you are going to harvest (it).’
So they set out, murmuring among themselves:

verses.quran_arabic: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌۭ
verses.text: ‘No poor person will enter it today in your presence.’
They went out early, able to (their) task.
But when they saw it, they said, ‘Surely we have gone astray indeed!
No! We have been robbed!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.text: The most moderate one of them said, ‘Did I not say to you, “Why do you not glorify (God)?”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Glory to our Lord! Surely we have been evildoers!’
So some of them approached others blaming each other.
They said, ‘Woe to us! Surely we have been insolent transgressors!

verses.quran_arabic: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًۭا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
verses.text: It may be that our Lord will give us a better one in exchange for it. Surely we turn in hope to our Lord.’

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Such was the punishment. Yet the punishment of the Hereafter is indeed greater, if (only) they knew.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: Surely for the ones who guard (themselves) (there will be) Gardens of Bliss with their Lord.
Shall We treat those who submit like the sinners?
What is (the matter) with you? How do you judge?
Or do you have a Book which you study?
Surely you (would) have in it whatever indeed you choose!

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: Or do you have guarantees from Us, reaching to the Day of Resurrection? Surely you (would) have whatever indeed you judge!
Ask them which of them will guarantee that.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or do they have associates? Let them bring their associates, if they are truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍۢ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when the leg will be bared, and they will be called to (make) prostration, but are unable:

verses.quran_arabic: خَٰشِعَةً أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌۭ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: their sight will be downcast, and humiliation will cover them, because they had been called to (make) prostration when they were able.

verses.quran_arabic: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So leave Me (to deal with) anyone who calls this proclamation a lie. We shall lead them on step by step without their realizing it.
And I shall spare them – surely My plan is strong.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًۭا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍۢ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or do you ask them for a reward, so that they are burdened with debt?
Or is the unseen in their keeping, and so they are writing (it) down?

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌۭ
verses.text: Be patient for the judgment of your Lord, and do not be like the companion of the fish, when he called out, choked with distress.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌۭ
verses.text: If a blessing from his Lord had not reached him, he would indeed have been tossed on the desert (shore), condemned.
But his Lord chose him, and made him one of the righteous.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
verses.text: Surely those who disbelieve almost indeed make you stumble with their look, when they hear the Reminder. They say, ‘Surely he is possessed indeed!’
Yet it is nothing but a reminder to the worlds.
